sect1.title: helios::engine::modules::ui::binding::systems
sect1.para: This namespace contains systems that connect game state to UI widgets, enabling automatic UI updates when the underlying data changes.

entry.para: Updates text components when observed score values change
Updates text components when observed high score values change
Updates text components when observed game timer values change

sect1.title: Score2UiTextUpdateSystem
sect1.para: Queries entities with both ScoreObserverComponent and UiTextComponent. When the score observer signals an update, the system propagates the new total score to the text component.

sect1.title: MaxScore2UiTextUpdateSystem
sect1.para: Queries entities with both MaxScoreObserverComponent and UiTextComponent. When the max score observer signals an update, the system propagates the new high score to the text component.

sect1.title: GameTimer2UiTextUpdateSystem
sect1.para: Queries entities with GameTimerBindingComponent, TimeFormatterComponent, and UiTextComponent. When the observed timer's revision changes, the system formats the current time via the TimeFormatterComponent and updates the text component.
